description: Per-organization overrides, layered ON TOP of calc_rules.json defaults. Only keys present here override; everything else inherits the industry standard. This is the user-owned, accreting customization that makes OpticAI 'know' a specific operator. v2 keys match calc_rules v2 (labor_basis, burden multiplier, food_cost_definition, beverage tracking, operating_week_start).

custom_column_aliases.comment: Maps THIS org's quirky export column names to canonical metric ids. Captured progressively as users confirm ambiguous columns (manual confirmation in v1).

custom_metrics.comment: Org-defined KPIs not in the base ontology.

targets.comment: Org-specific goals. Note these are FULLY-BURDENED labor targets, matching this org's labor_basis.
